commit.message:
Add context tokens field to Local mode

Adds a persistent "Context tokens" field in the Local Settings box
(below the Model field, default 32768). At launch, the value is
injected as OLLAMA_NUM_CTX and LM_STUDIO_NUM_CTX so both Ollama and
LM Studio use the configured context window. Values below 32768 are
clamped. The setting is saved and restored across sessions.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Use standalone server on port 8005 instead of HA HTTP

The Koubachi sensor is hardcoded to talk to api.koubachi.com:8005.
Running our own aiohttp server on that port means a simple local DNS
override (api.koubachi.com → HA IP) is all that's needed — no sensor
reconfiguration required.

- http.py: replace HomeAssistantView subclasses with plain aiohttp
  handlers; add build_app/start_server/stop_server lifecycle helpers
- __init__.py: start server on first entry setup, stop on last unload
- const.py: add SERVER_PORT = 8005
- manifest.json: drop http dependency (no longer using HA HTTP server)
- README.md: document Docker port mapping and DNS override setup

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

ui: Replace folder cards with compact chips on Thinkers page

Schools of thought now display as inline pill chips instead of large grid
cards. Each chip shows colored dot, name, and thinker count with delete
on hover. Reduces vertical space ~60% and scales to 30+ folders.

Vercel deploy (#2)

* feat: configure for Vercel deployment

- Remove GitHub Pages base path from vite.config.ts
- Add vercel.json with SPA rewrite rules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* feat: add Vercel Edge Function proxy for Anthropic API

- Add /api/ai.ts edge function that proxies requests to Anthropic
  using server-side ANTHROPIC_API_KEY (key never exposed to browser)
- Update src/utils/ai.ts to call /api/ai instead of Anthropic directly
- Update vercel.json to exclude /api/ routes from SPA rewrite

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* security: harden API proxy and add security headers

api/ai.ts:
- Reject non-POST requests
- Validate Content-Type header
- Block requests from unauthorized origins (ALLOWED_ORIGIN env var)
- Enforce 4MB payload size limit
- Validate JSON structure before forwarding

vercel.json:
- Add X-Frame-Options: DENY (clickjacking protection)
- Add X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff (MIME sniffing protection)
- Add Strict-Transport-Security (force HTTPS)
- Add Permissions-Policy (disable camera/mic/geolocation)
- Add Referrer-Policy
- Add Content-Security-Policy (restrict resource origins)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Task 11: Full segment rendering (#13)

* Task 11: feat: full segment rendering with canonical order

Add client/src/segments.js with renderSegments() that renders all banner
segments in spec-defined order: app_name, environment, branch, sha,
commit_date, uptime, deploy-age, tests, build, port, custom fields.

Add client/src/time.js with formatUptime, formatDeployAge, and
startUptimeTicker for live uptime display.

Update main.js to use renderSegments instead of inline rendering, and
clear ticker timer on destroy.

34 tests in segments.test.js covering all segment types, ordering,
branch hiding, status dots, clickable links, custom fields, and XSS.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix: address PR #13 review feedback

Design review:
- Remove dead `config` param from renderSegments signature and call site
- Return only { tickerTimerId } instead of also returning wrapper reference
- Add comment justifying size budget increase from 3072 to 4096

DRY review:
- Extract _parseElapsedMs helper in time.js (shared by formatUptime,
  formatDeployAge, startUptimeTicker)
- Parameterize status dot tests with it.each
- Parameterize URL present/absent tests with it.each
- Move tickerTimerId cleanup to afterEach via render() helper

Security review:
- Validate URL scheme in _createStatusSegment — only http/https allowed,
  javascript: URIs fall back to plain <span>
- Add test for javascript: URL rejection

Ticker hardening:
- Add element.isConnected guard in startUptimeTicker to self-clean when
  element is removed from DOM without destroy()

commit.message:
infra(ci): support shared DinD service for ARC runners (#547)

* infra(ci): support shared DinD service for ARC runners

- testcontainers: replace hardcoded 127.0.0.1 with container.get_host()
  so connections resolve correctly when DOCKER_HOST points to a remote
  daemon (shared DinD over TCP)
- sqlx-check: use unique container names (postgres-$RUN_ID), random port
  mapping (-p 0:5432), and dynamic DATABASE_URL based on runner environment
- Both changes are backward-compatible with GHA ubuntu-latest runners

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix context manager reuse bug in robustness-sweep (Python 3.12)

Replace _null_ctx() generator-based context manager with
contextlib.nullcontext() which supports re-entry. The generator
CM can only be entered once, causing AttributeError on sweep
iteration 2/36 in Python 3.12+.

commit.message:
fix(stt): remove unused pub use from audio_toolkit mod

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use chartIntervalRef to avoid Rules of Hooks violation

Adding chartInterval to useEffect dep arrays changed their sizes between
renders, crashing PriceChart. Also caused a time-ordering bug where
series.update() fired before setData([]) when switching intervals.

Fix: read chartInterval via a ref in the currentPrice and indicatorUpdate
effects so they are not re-triggered by interval changes. Only the fetch
effect (which calls setData([]) first) responds to interval changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

修复多个Bug并增加多尺度图片匹配以适应不同分辨率

- 多尺度模板匹配：在0.5x~2.0x范围内自动缩放模板，解决不同分辨率下图片识别失败的问题
- 修复灰度图崩溃：增加对灰度图（无第3维）的处理
- 修复循环模式无间隔：取消注释循环间延迟代码
- 修复FAILSAFE矛盾：移除模块级FAILSAFE=False，保留类内FAILSAFE=True
- 修复search_image_above区域坐标格式：改为(left, top, width, height)
- 修复等待步骤不可中断：固定等待改为分段sleep，支持should_stop中断
- 提取MatchResult为模块级类，避免每次调用重复定义

commit.message:
fix: show only logo or name in header, not both

- If logo_url exists: display only the logo image
- If logo_url is empty: display only AppLogo + store name
- Prevents both logo and name from showing simultaneously

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix GRN delete 500 error - bypass ORM to avoid VARCHAR/UUID type mismatch

po_serials.grn_id is String(36) but goods_receipt_notes.id is UUID.
When db.delete(grn) triggers lazy-load of scanned_serials relationship,
PostgreSQL fails on uuid = varchar comparison. Use raw SQL for all
deletion steps and expunge the ORM object before commit.

commit.message:
Fix tab-switch data-verlies: verwijder destructieve visibilitychange re-fetch

Hoofdoorzaak: useFetchOnMount re-fetchte data bij elke tab-switch via
visibilitychange. Supabase queries met verlopen tokens retourneerden
data=null, waardoor setSections(null ?? []) alle bestaande data wiste.

Fixes:
- Verwijder visibilitychange handler uit useFetchOnMount (React state
  blijft behouden bij tab-switches, re-fetch is onnodig en destructief)
- page-renderer.tsx: gebruik stabiele deps (userId, userRole) i.p.v.
  object-referenties (user, profile) die bij elke auth-wijziging een
  nieuwe referentie krijgen en het effect onnodig laten herfiren
- page-renderer.tsx: voeg try/catch + cancelled flag toe zodat bij
  gefaalde queries de bestaande data behouden blijft

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

CBO budget management overhaul: scaling safeguards, batch limits, and automation

- Remove all ABO logic — scale_winner always increases CBO campaign budget
- Add 3-day cooldown on winner scaling to prevent learning phase resets
- Deduplicate scale cards per campaign (no double-scaling)
- Add MAX_CONCEPTS_PER_BATCH=3 cap on auto-push per market
- Add increase_budget action for testing capacity (separate from winner scaling)
- Add budget increase button to launchpad when queued concepts > available room
- Add Telegram notification when concept translations complete (with readiness check)
- Add withRetry() wrapper for Meta API calls (image upload, creative, ad creation)
- Export BUDGET_PER_NEW_CONCEPT and campaignIds from budget calculation

refactor: separate Overview (what it does) from Process (how it's built)

All 4 two-page projects had Overview and Process bullets repeating
the same content. Now clearly separated:
- Overview: features, results, user-facing capabilities
- Process: architecture, algorithms, tech stack, implementation details

commit.message:
fix: query_rss 旧闻误入修复 — Google News URL resolver + 分级日期提取 + 历史去重

核心问题：query_rss 把 Google News 聚合时间当原文发布时间，导致旧闻混入简报。

修复策略：
- 新增 Google News URL Resolver（token_decode → batchexecute → html_extract）
  还原真实文章 URL，resolver 成功率 99.2%
- 重写日期提取为 6 级优先级（JSON-LD → meta → time → 正文 → Last-Modified）
  基于真实文章页提取发布时间，而非依赖 RSS feed 时间
- 新增 .state/seen_urls.jsonl 历史去重库（14 天保留），防止跨日重复
- 新增 query_rss_unresolved_url 硬过滤（URL 解析失败直接淘汰）
- 移除 AOL.com 屏蔽规则（旧闻临时措施，已无必要）

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

reject. 11 new tests covering tenant isolation and activity logging.
